name: copilot-credits-tracker
description: Shows monthly GitHub Copilot AI credit usage from local Copilot Chat debug logs

commands.title: Copilot Credits: Show Raw Event Diagnostics

copilotCredits.monthlyBudgetAiu.description: Your personal monthly AIU budget (0 = disabled). Tip: divide your organisation's pool by the number of users. Shown as a progress bar in the usage chart.

copilotCredits.expensiveRequestThreshold.description: Show a VS Code notification when a single request costs more than this many AIU (0 = disabled).

copilotCredits.useDevFixtures.description: Development only: read synthetic Copilot logs from dev-fixtures/ in the extension folder instead of real VS Code workspaceStorage.

scripts.test: npm run compile && node --test out/test/usageParser.test.js out/test/monthlyAggregator.test.js
